_note: Phase D1 hand-curated fixture for the BSE/NSE corporate-filings source. Replaced by a live scraper in Phase D2; the schema (symbol/date/title/body/source_url) is the contract any future fetcher must satisfy. Symbols chosen to mix universe constituents and known catalyst types.

filings.title: Q4 FY26 Results: Significantly improved performance
filings.body: RPG Life Sciences reports Q4 EPS up double-digit YoY, beat estimates by 12%. Revenue growth substantial, ahead of consensus. Management cited strong CRAMS pipeline and US generic launches.

filings.title: Board approves share buyback
filings.body: Sun Pharma board approved a buyback of up to 1.2 crore equity shares at INR 1750 per share, total deployment ~INR 2100 crore. Buyback ratio 0.8% of paid-up capital. Open-market route.

filings.title: Resignation of Managing Director and CEO
filings.body: The Board of Indus Towers Ltd. announces the resignation of the Managing Director with effect from 30 April 2026. A senior member of the leadership team has been appointed as the new managing director.

filings.title: Q4 FY26 Quarterly Results - margin expansion
filings.body: Atul Ltd. reports Q4 EPS up double-digit YoY, exceeded consensus estimates. Specialty chemicals segment delivered major margin expansion. EBITDA margin up significantly vs prior year.

filings.title: Acquisition of US-based defense components subsidiary
filings.body: Bharat Forge announced the acquisition of XYZ Defense Components LLC for USD 120 million via scheme of arrangement. Acquired entity manufactures titanium alloy parts for US defense primes; expands the company's US defense segment substantially.

filings.title: Q4 FY26 quarterly results announcement
filings.body: Divis Laboratories Q4 FY26 results filed. Revenue ahead of last year. Management did not provide forward guidance. No exceptional items.

filings.title: Notice of Annual General Meeting
filings.body: Notice is hereby given that the Annual General Meeting of the members will be held on 15 March 2026. Routine board governance matters; no operational catalyst.
